query:
UPDATE athleteActivity a 
JOIN users u ON a.athleteId = u.id 
SET a.athleteName = u.name 
WHERE a.athleteName IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute UPDATE athleteActivity a 
JOIN users u ON a.athleteId = u.id 
SET a.athleteName = u.name 
WHERE a.athleteName IS NULL;
